submodules.name: Mesh Advanced Editing API
submodules.description: Advanced C# API for manipulating meshes. Used by UnityEngine.Mesh::AllocateWritableMeshData(), UnityEngine.Mesh::ApplyAndDisposeWritableMeshData(), ...

submodules.name: Mesh Recalculate Bounds API
submodules.description: C# API for updating bounds of a mesh. Used by UnityEngine.Mesh::RecalculateBounds().

submodules.name: Mesh Recalculate Normals API
submodules.description: C# API for recalculating normals of a mesh. Used by UnityEngine.Mesh::RecalculateNormals().
